attributes.name: [AWS EC2 OTel] Status check availability 99.5% rolling 30 days
attributes.description: Per-instance SLO that treats each 5-minute window as healthy when the CloudWatch StatusCheckFailed metric (Maximum statistic) is below 1, meaning neither the system nor instance status check reported a failure. Targets 99.5% of rolling 30-day windows as healthy. This is the primary EC2 platform-availability signal: a failed check indicates AWS-detected impairment requiring recover or reboot. Application-only failures while checks remain at 0 are outside this data source and should be monitored separately.

params.filter: data_stream.dataset: "aws.ec2.otel" AND Namespace: "AWS/EC2" AND MetricName: "StatusCheckFailed" AND stat: "Maximum"
